hero.headline: Everything you need for your renovation
hero.subheadline: From small repairs to comprehensive renovations. We do it all so you don't have to worry about anything.

price.title: Best market price
price.desc: We guarantee the most competitive price without compromising quality.

delivery.title: Fastest delivery in Catalonia
delivery.desc: Our in-house team works without subcontractors to deliver your project on time.

quality.title: Certified quality
quality.desc: Every project undergoes rigorous quality controls before handover.

projects.title: +500 completed projects
projects.desc: Over 500 projects in Barcelona and all of Catalonia back our experience.

quote.desc: You will receive a detailed, no-obligation quote in under 24 hours.

team.title: In-house team, no subcontractors
team.desc: All work is carried out by our expert team, guaranteeing greater control and quality.

howWeWork.intro: No complications. We accompany you every step of the way.

items.name: María García
items.text: They renovated our flat in record time and with impeccable quality. The price was the best we found on the market. Highly recommended!

items.name: Carlos Martínez
items.text: They built our family home with personalised attention at every stage. True professionals who deliver on their promises.

items.name: Anna Puig
items.text: They rehabilitated our building's facade in less time than expected. Excellent service and fantastic result. Would use them again without hesitation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We are here to help. Contact us and we will respond in under 24 hours.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We are a construction company with over 15 years of experience in Barcelona and all of Catalonia.
about.story: Founded in Barcelona, ObraDirecta is a construction company committed to excellence, transparency and client satisfaction. Our team of over 50 qualified professionals works without subcontractors to guarantee maximum quality control on every project.
about.mission: Our mission is simple: to deliver the best construction and renovation projects in Catalonia, at the best market price and in the shortest possible time.
